objects.name: customer_segments_mail_v
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
  SubscriberID,
  GCID,
  SentTime,
  SendDateID,
  Subject,
  SendID,
  EmailName,
  CampaignGroup,
  CampaignSubGroup,
  CampaignName,
  CampaignNumber,
  CountOpen,
  UniqueOpen,
  CountClicks,
  UniqueClicks,
  CountBounce,
  Delivered,
  OpenDate,
  ClickDate,
  CountSend,
  LSD,
  etr_y,
  etr_ym,
  etr_ymd
FROM main.bi_output.bi_output_marketing_sfmc_sfmc_report

columns.name: SubscriberID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the email subscriber

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID linked to the internal client profile

columns.name: SentTime
columns.comment: The exact timestamp when the email was dispatched

columns.name: SendDateID
columns.comment: Date key for the email send event (YYYYMMDD format)

columns.name: Subject
columns.comment: The subject line of the email campaign

columns.name: SendID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the specific email send batch

columns.name: EmailName
columns.comment: Internal name of the email template used

columns.name: CampaignGroup
columns.comment: High-level marketing category (e.g., Retention, Acquisition)

columns.name: CampaignSubGroup
columns.comment: Specific marketing segment or sub-category

columns.name: CampaignName
columns.comment: Public or internal name of the marketing campaign

columns.name: CampaignNumber
columns.comment: Numerical identifier for the campaign tracking

columns.name: CountOpen
columns.comment: Total number of times the email was opened

columns.name: UniqueOpen
columns.comment: Binary flag or count (0 or 1) indicating if the user opened the email at least once

columns.name: CountClicks
columns.comment: Total number of clicks recorded within the email

columns.name: UniqueClicks
columns.comment: Binary flag or count (0 or 1) indicating if the user clicked any link at least once

columns.name: CountBounce
columns.comment: Indicates if the email bounced (1 for yes, 0 for no)

columns.name: Delivered
columns.comment: Binary flag indicating if the email was successfully delivered (1 for yes, 0 for no)

columns.name: OpenDate
columns.comment: The date of the first open event

columns.name: ClickDate
columns.comment: The date of the first click event

columns.name: CountSend
columns.comment: Total number of sends for this record (usually 1)

columns.name: LSD
columns.comment: Last Send Date or relevant legacy tracking date

columns.name: etr_y
columns.comment: Partition year (YYYY)

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Partition year and month (YYYY-MM)

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Partition year, month, and day (YYYY-MM-DD)

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: OLD: earliest across IBAN/TP union; NEW: Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate. Source: Dim_Customer, eMoney_Fact_Transaction_Status, Fact_CustomerAction. (T2 — Function_MIMO_First_Deposit_All_Platforms)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References Dim_Customer.RealCID. Always include in WHERE/JOIN for optimal performance.

columns.name: MIMOAction
columns.comment: Payment type code (check, wire, ACH, etc.). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Sodreconciliation.apex.EXT869_CashActivity)

columns.name: TransactionID
columns.comment: Deposit transaction identifier. NULL for non-deposit events.

columns.name: AmountUSD
columns.comment: Same routing as date/amount sources. Source: Dim_Customer, eMoney_Fact_Transaction_Status, Fact_CustomerAction. (T2 — Function_MIMO_First_Deposit_All_Platforms)

columns.name: AmountOrigCurrency
columns.comment: Transaction amount in original currency. Passthrough from sub-platform tables. `-1` sentinel for MoneyFarm (original amount unavailable). Negative for withdrawals on TP. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: FundingTypeID
columns.comment: Type of payment instrument. Sourced from Billing.Funding.FundingTypeID (not from Billing.Deposit directly). Categorizes the deposit by payment method (credit card, wire, ACH, etc.). (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: CurrencyID
columns.comment: Primary key. Universal instrument identifier. 0=NULL placeholder, 1-8=major forex currencies, ~1000+=stocks (AAPL, GOOG, etc.), ~100000+=crypto (BTC, ETH). Referenced by virtually all DWH fact tables. Legacy name: eToro originated as forex-only. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Currency upstream wiki)

columns.name: Currency
columns.comment: Currency code (**Dim_Currency.Abbreviation**). (Tier 2 -- SP_DepositWithdrawFee, Dim_Currency.Abbreviation)

columns.name: IsPlatformFTD
columns.comment: Platform-level first-time deposit flag. 1 = first deposit on this specific platform (TP, eMoney, Options, or MoneyFarm independently). Renamed from IsFTD. Updated by FTD recovery logic for DateID >= 20250901. Note: 13K bad-FTD cohort (Aug 18-20 2025 $1 FTDs) excluded via REMOVE_BAD_FTDS in Function_MIMO_First_Deposit_All_Platforms. (Tier 1 - Function_MIMO_First_Deposit_All_Platforms)

columns.name: IsInternalTransfer
columns.comment: Internal fund transfer flag. `ISNULL(f.IsInternalTransfer, 0)`. 1 = transfer between platforms (TP <-> eMoney), not an external deposit/withdrawal. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: IsRedeem
columns.comment: Redeem flag. 0=not a redeem, 1=is a redeem. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as `Dim_Position.IsRedeem` (via RedeemStatus mapping). (Tier 3 - ETL-derived)

columns.name: IsTradeFromIBAN
columns.comment: eMoney-initiated trade flag. `ISNULL(f.IsIBANTrade, 0)`. Renamed from `IsIBANTrade` in sub-platform tables. 1 = deposit originated from eMoney IBAN. Always 0 for Options/MoneyFarm. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: MIMOPlatform
columns.comment: Platform discriminator. Values: TradingPlatform (CFD/Stocks TP), eMoney (IBAN/wallet), Options (Apex/US Options via Gatsby), MoneyFarm (UK managed investment - FTD only, no withdrawals). Options is full delete/re-insert every run due to unreliable data arrival. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: IsGlobalFTD
columns.comment: Routed OLD_BASE vs NEW_BASE; NEW from Dim_Customer; OLD from first-ranked eMoney/TP deposit. Source: Dim_Customer, eMoney_Fact_Transaction_Status, Fact_CustomerAction. (T2 — Function_MIMO_First_Deposit_All_Platforms)

columns.name: IsCryptoToFiat
columns.comment: Explicit literal `0` - reserved column (C2F captured on other DDR MIMO siblings). `INSERT SELECT … , 0 AS IsCryptoToFiat`. **PLUS `UPDATE`** sets **`1`** for **`FundingTypeID=27` TP deposits `DateID>=20250701` (see section 2.5). **eMoney** uses **`TxTypeID=14`** per sibling (**`BI_DB_ddr…eMoney`**). **`Options`/MoneyFarm forced `0` on insert.** **(Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_MIMO_Trading_Platform)**

columns.name: IsRecurring
columns.comment: 1=deposit is part of a recurring schedule (OUTER APPLY on Billing.RecurringDeposit). 0=one-time deposit. (Tier 2 - SP_Fact_BillingDeposit_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: IsIBANQuickTransfer
columns.comment: eMoney Internal Transfer (quick transfer) flag. MoveMoneyReasonID=6. 1 = customer used the eMoney Internal Transfer feature to move funds. Distinct from TP internal transfers (IsInternalTransfer). Always 0 for Options/MoneyFarm. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: ETL load timestamp. `GETDATE()` at SP execution time. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Fact_MIMO_AllPlatforms)

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer.

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: CONVERT(NVARCHAR(8), TradeDate, 112). Source: Sodreconciliation_apex_EXT1047_RevenueReports.TradeDate. (T2 — Function_Revenue_OptionsPlatform)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key.

columns.name: ActionTypeID
columns.comment: Event type classifier. References Dim_ActionType.

columns.name: ActionType
columns.comment: CASE WHEN Side = ’B’ THEN ’ManualPositionOpen’ WHEN Side = ’S’ THEN ’ManualPositionClose’ END. Source: Sodreconciliation_apex_EXT1047_RevenueReports.Side. (T2 — Function_Revenue_OptionsPlatform)

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. (Tier 1 - Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: IsSettled
columns.comment: Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).

columns.name: IsCopy
columns.comment: Flag: 1 = position opened via copy-trading, 0 = manually opened.

columns.name: Metric
columns.comment: ’Options_PFOF’. Source: —. (T2 — Function_Revenue_OptionsPlatform)

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: SUM(ABS(CustomerPFOFPayback)) WHERE ClearingAccount NOT IN (excluded house accounts) AND TradeDate BETWEEN CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @sdateInt), 112) AND CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @edateInt), 112) (GROUP BY trade date, customer, side, instrument type, etc.). Source: Sodreconciliation_apex_EXT1047_RevenueReports.CustomerPFOFPayback. (T2 — Function_Revenue_OptionsPlatform)

columns.name: CountTransactions
columns.comment: COUNT(OrderID). Source: Sodreconciliation_apex_EXT1047_RevenueReports.OrderID. (T2 — Function_Revenue_OptionsPlatform)

columns.name: CountAsActiveTrade
columns.comment: CASE WHEN Side = ’B’ THEN 1 ELSE 0 END. Source: Sodreconciliation_apex_EXT1047_RevenueReports.Side. (T2 — Function_Revenue_OptionsPlatform)

columns.name: IsBuy
columns.comment: Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).

columns.name: IsFuture
columns.comment: 1=futures contract (instrument in Trade.InstrumentGroups WHERE GroupID=25), 0=not futures. 243 flagged as futures. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: IsClosedToIBAN
columns.comment: Position closed to eMoney IBAN flag. Set via UPDATE JOIN to `External_*_closed_to_iban_parquet`; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsAirDrop
columns.comment: 1=position was created via an airdrop event (crypto). ETL-computed: JOIN to etoro_Trade_PositionAirdropLog. NULL=not an airdrop. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: gcid
columns.comment: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: cid
columns.comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.

columns.name: sps_user_id
columns.comment: Canonical Spaceship user_id, deduplicated via member_canonical (Super) and user_id_map (Voyager/Nova) to resolve 1:many member_id mappings.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was last modified (ETL refresh marker).

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID - the platform-wide unique customer identifier. References `Dim_Customer.GCID`. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References `Dim_Customer.RealCID`. Each customer has one real CID. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Occurred
columns.comment: UTC timestamp when the action occurred. For position opens: when position was opened. For logins: login time. For credits: when the credit was recorded. (Tier 1 - source-dependent)

columns.name: ActionTypeID
columns.comment: Event type classifier. References `DWH_dbo.Dim_ActionType.ActionTypeID` - JOIN for Name, Category, CategoryID. See Section 2.1 for full mapping. Key filter column - drives which other columns are populated. (Tier 1 - ETL-derived from CreditTypeID/source)

columns.name: PlatformTypeID
columns.comment: Legacy platform type. 0=default (most rows), 99=STS source. Values 1-9 for specific platforms. (Tier 3 - ETL-assigned)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Position size in currency. Must be >= 0. Stored in dollars (PositionOpen divides by 100 from cents). (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: Leverage
columns.comment: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: NetProfit
columns.comment: Realized PnL. 0 when open; set on close. In position currency. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: Commission
columns.comment: Open commission in dollars. PositionOpen stores @Commission/100 (cents to dollars). (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: A surrogate key for a unique trade position, which is either the original position ID or a parsed value from the action description when the action type is 36 and the compensation reason is 117 or 118.

columns.name: FundingTypeID
columns.comment: Payment method used for deposits/withdrawals. 0 for non-deposit events. References `DWH_dbo.Dim_FundingType.FundingTypeID` - JOIN for Name, IsNewStyle, IsSingleFunding, IsCashoutActive. (Tier 5 - domain expert)

columns.name: MirrorID
columns.comment: A foreign key indicating whether a trade is a copy-trade child or manual trading. It is set to 0 if the action occurred after the data mirror occurred, otherwise it takes the mirror ID from either the data provider or the fact customer action, where 0 or NULL implies manual trading and a value greater than 0 implies a copy-trade child.

columns.name: WithdrawID
columns.comment: Withdrawal request ID for cashout events. 0 for non-cashout events. (Tier 1 - History.Credit)

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date of the action as integer YYYYMMDD. Derived from `Occurred`. Part of nonclustered indexes. (Tier 2 - ETL-computed)

columns.name: CompensationReasonID
columns.comment: Compensation reason for compensation events (ActionTypeID=36) and position opens (for airdrop identification). References `BackOffice.CompensationReason`. 0 for non-compensation events. (Tier 1 - History.Credit, updated 2025-12-21)

columns.name: WithdrawPaymentID
columns.comment: Payment processing ID for cashout/withdrawal events. 0 for non-cashout events. Used to deduplicate WithdrawProcessingID rows in the ETL. (Tier 1 - History.Credit)

columns.name: CommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Commission charged on close. DWH note: adjusted by SP_Dim_Position when position is reopened; CommissionOnCloseOrig stores the pre-adjustment value. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: DepositID
columns.comment: Deposit transaction identifier. NULL for non-deposit events. (Tier 1 - History.Credit)

columns.name: FullCommission
columns.comment: Full commission including spread. PositionOpen stores @FullCommission/100. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: FullCommissionOnClose
columns.comment: Full commission on close. DWH note: adjusted by SP_Dim_Position when position is reopened; FullCommissionOnCloseOrig stores the pre-adjustment value. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: RedeemID
columns.comment: Billing.Redeem reference when position closed via redeem. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: RedeemStatus
columns.comment: Redemption state. Billing.Redeem integration. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: IsRedeem
columns.comment: Redeem flag. 0=not a redeem, 1=is a redeem. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as `Dim_Position.IsRedeem` (via RedeemStatus mapping). (Tier 3 - ETL-derived)

columns.name: ReopenForPositionID
columns.comment: When position was reopened: references the erroneously closed PositionID. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: IsReOpen
columns.comment: Indicates if a previously closed trade is reopened, populated with 1 if true, otherwise 0.

columns.name: CommissionOnCloseOrig
columns.comment: Represents original commission charged when a trade is closed, populated at close, otherwise zero.

columns.name: FullCommissionOnCloseOrig
columns.comment: Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen. ETL default 0. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: OriginalPositionID
columns.comment: Original position ID for positions split by partial close. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: IsPartialCloseParent
columns.comment: 1=this position was partially closed (is the parent in a partial close event). (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: IsPartialCloseChild
columns.comment: 1=this position is the child (remainder) of a partial close event. Generally filter out child positions from most metrics on OPEN when aggregating, but not all (e.g., volume is already pro-rated so excluding these is wrong). NEVER filter these out on CLOSE. (Tier 5 - domain expert, SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: PaymentStatusID
columns.comment: Payment processing status for deposit/cashout events. NULL for non-payment events. References `DWH_dbo.Dim_PaymentStatus.PaymentStatusID` - JOIN for Name. (Tier 5 - domain expert)

columns.name: IsDiscounted
columns.comment: 1=position received a discounted rate. DWH note: CAST from bit to int. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: IsSettled
columns.comment: 1 = real asset, 0 = CFD asset. (Tier 5 - Expert Review)

columns.name: CommissionByUnits
columns.comment: Prorated commission for partial close. Formula: (AmountInUnitsDecimal / InitialUnits) * Commission. Used for partial-close PnL. (Tier 1 - Trade.Position)

columns.name: FullCommissionByUnits
columns.comment: Prorated full commission for partial close. Same proration formula as CommissionByUnits applied to FullCommission. (Tier 1 - Trade.Position)

columns.name: IsFTD
columns.comment: First-Time Deposit flag: 1 = this is the customer's first deposit. NULL for non-deposit events. (Tier 2 - ETL-computed)

columns.name: IsFeeDividend
columns.comment: Fee sub-type for ActionTypeID=35: 1=overnight/weekend fee, 2=dividend, 3=SDRT, 4=ticket fees (OpenTotalFees/CloseTotalFees). NULL for non-fee events. See Section 2.2 and DSM-1463. (Tier 2 - ETL-derived from Description)

columns.name: IsAirDrop
columns.comment: 1=position was created via an airdrop event (crypto). ETL-computed: JOIN to etoro_Trade_PositionAirdropLog. NULL=not an airdrop. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: DividendID
columns.comment: Dividend event identifier for dividend-related fees. NULL for non-dividend events. (Tier 1 - Trade positions)

columns.name: MoveMoneyReasonID
columns.comment: Reason for money movement: 1=Adjustment, 5=InternalTransfer Trade, 6=InternalTransfer, 8=Recurring Deposit, 9=Recurring Investment. References `Dictionary.MoveMoneyReason`. (Tier 1 - History.Credit)

columns.name: SettlementTypeID
columns.comment: Modern settlement classification. Dictionary.SettlementTypes: 0=CFD, 1=REAL, 2=TRS, 3=CMT, 4=REAL_FUTURES, 5=MARGIN_TRADE. Replaces IsSettled. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: etr_y
columns.comment: Year extracted from etoro date.

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Year and month extracted from etoro date.

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Year, month, and day extracted from etoro date.

columns.name: DLTOpen
columns.comment: DLT flag at open. Added 2024-06-02 (Ofir A). (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: DLTClose
columns.comment: DLT flag at close. Added 2024-06-02. NULL for open positions and older positions. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

columns.name: OpenMarkupByUnits
columns.comment: Prorated open markup for partial close. Formula: OpenMarkup * AmountInUnitsDecimal / InitialUnits. (Tier 1 - Trade.Position)

columns.name: Description
columns.comment: Human-readable description. Populated mainly for ActionTypeID=35 (fees): "Over night fee", "Payment caused by dividend", "Weekend fee", "OpenTotalFees", "CloseTotalFees", "SDRT Charge". For ActionTypeID=32: "edit stop loss by customer". For deposits: "Processed By eToro.Payments.Deposit", etc. (Tier 1 - History.Credit, added 2024-08)

columns.name: IsBuy
columns.comment: 1 = Long/Buy (profit when price rises), 0 = Short/Sell. (Tier 1 - Trade.PositionTbl)

columns.name: CreditID
columns.comment: Reference to the source `History.Credit.CreditID`. Enables join back to credit history for audit. (Tier 1 - History.Credit, added 2025-07)

columns.name: OpenDateID
columns.comment: Open date as YYYYMMDD int. In this view, derived by: casting dp.OpenDateID to INT.

columns.name: CloseDateID
columns.comment: Close date as YYYYMMDD int. 0=still open. Part of clustered index. Key filter for open vs closed.

columns.name: TicketFeeAction
columns.comment: The type of ticket fee action, which is set to ’Open’ if the description matches ’OpenTotalFees’, ’Close’ if it matches ’CloseTotalFees’, and NULL otherwise.

columns.name: RollOverFee
columns.comment: Overnight/weekend fee, populated when action type is fee-related and sub-type is overnight/weekend.

columns.name: Dividend
columns.comment: Dividend payment amount, populated when event type is dividend fee, otherwise zero.

columns.name: SDRT
columns.comment: Represents Stamp Duty Reserve Tax when action type is fee-related and sub-type is SDRT, otherwise zero.

columns.name: AdminFee
columns.comment: Administrative fee is charged when a specific compensation event occurs, otherwise it is zero.

columns.name: SpotAdjustFee
columns.comment: Fee adjustment for specific compensation events, populated when action type is compensation and reason ID is 118, otherwise zero.

columns.name: ConversionFeeDeposit
columns.comment: Fee deposited when action type is deposit-related, otherwise zero.

columns.name: ConversionFeeWithdraw
columns.comment: Fee incurred when withdrawing funds, populated for cashout events with a payment ID.

columns.name: ConversionFeeReversal
columns.comment: Reversal fee applied when a deposit transaction is cancelled, otherwise zero.

columns.name: CashoutFeeExludingRedeem
columns.comment: Fee excluding redeem, populated when action type is 30 and not a redeem, otherwise zero.

columns.name: TransferCoinFee
columns.comment: Represents the transfer coin fee, populated when a redeem action occurs, otherwise zero.

columns.name: DormantFee
columns.comment: Fee applied when an account is dormant, populated for compensation events with reason ID 30, otherwise zero.

columns.name: ShareLendingFeeEtoroShare
columns.comment: Fee paid to eToro for share lending, populated when action type is compensation and reason is share lending.

columns.name: ShareLendingFeeUserShare
columns.comment: Fee paid to user for share lending, populated when action type is compensation and reason is share lending.

columns.name: ShareLendingFeeBrokerShare
columns.comment: Broker's share of share lending fee, populated when action type is compensation and reason is specific, otherwise zero.

columns.name: ShareLendingGrossAmount
columns.comment: Gross share lending amount, populated when action type is compensation and reason is specific, otherwise zero.

columns.name: CashoutAdjustment
columns.comment: Adjustment made to cashout for specific compensation events, otherwise zero.

columns.name: NewCopyAmount
columns.comment: Represents the amount when an action type is a specific event, otherwise zero.

columns.name: StopCopyAmount
columns.comment: Represents the amount to copy when an event type classifier is a stop event, otherwise it is zero.

columns.name: AddToCopyAmount
columns.comment: Represents additional copy amount when action type is '15', otherwise zero.

columns.name: RemoveFromCopyAmount
columns.comment: Represents amount removed when action type is "close" (16), otherwise zero.

columns.name: CryptoToPosition
columns.comment: Represents compensation amount in dollars for specific airdrop events, otherwise zero.

columns.name: BonusCompensation
columns.comment: Bonus compensation is paid when action type is a specific event, otherwise it is zero.

columns.name: PnLAdjustment
columns.comment: Represents compensation adjustment to profit/loss when action type is compensation event with reason ID 22.

columns.name: InvestedAmountIn
columns.comment: Initial investment amount when action type is buy, sell, or transfer.

columns.name: InvestedAmountOut
columns.comment: Investment amount withdrawn when action type is close, reduce, or expire, otherwise zero.

columns.name: VolumeOpen
columns.comment: Initial trade volume when action type is buy, sell, or modify.

columns.name: VolumeClose
columns.comment: Represents close volume when action type is close, partial close, or expiration, otherwise zero.

columns.name: TicketFeeOpen
columns.comment: Open ticket fees are stored when action type is fee-related and sub-type is ticket fee.

columns.name: TicketFeeClose
columns.comment: Ticket closing fee, populated when action type is fee-related and specifically a ticket close fee, otherwise zero.

columns.name: FullCommissionCloseAdjustment
columns.comment: Adjustment to full commission on close for certain event types, otherwise zero.

columns.name: CommissionCloseAdjustment
columns.comment: Adjustment to commission charged when a position is closed, populated for specific event types, otherwise zero.

columns.name: FullCommissionTotal
columns.comment: Total commission paid, populated for certain event types, otherwise zero.

columns.name: CommissionTotal
columns.comment: Total commission charged, populated for open, close, or partial close events, otherwise zero.

columns.name: IsActiveTrade
columns.comment: Indicates if a trade is active, populated when action type is buy or specific trade types, otherwise 0.

columns.name: IsSQF
columns.comment: Indicates if a trade is Self-Quantifying Firm (SQF) eligible, populated with 1 if eligible, otherwise 0.

columns.name: Is_245_Instrument
columns.comment: Indicates if an instrument is a 245 product, populated with 1 if true, otherwise 0.

columns.name: IsCopyFund
columns.comment: Indicates a mirrored fund, populated with 1 when mirror type is copy, otherwise 0.

columns.name: ParentCID
columns.comment: Represents the parent company ID when a company has a parent entity, otherwise zero.

columns.name: ParentUserName
columns.comment: Represents the username of the parent user, populated when a user has a designated parent.

columns.name: IsOpenFromIBAN
columns.comment: Indicates if an account is open from an International Bank Account Number, populated with 1 if linked, otherwise 0.

columns.name: IsClosedToIBAN
columns.comment: Indicates if a trade position is closed to IBAN, populated with 1 when a position ID exists, otherwise 0.

columns.name: IsRecurring
columns.comment: Indicates if a trade position is recurring, populated as 1 for specific action types with valid position or deposit IDs, otherwise 0.

columns.name: IsC2P
columns.comment: Indicates if a trade position is a compensation-to-position (C2P) transaction, populated with 1 when a valid position ID exists, otherwise 0.

columns.name: insert_date_time
columns.comment: Timestamp when the row was first inserted by the ETL pipeline.

columns.name: timestamp
columns.comment: The timestamp at which the request is received.

columns.name: userName
columns.comment: eToro platform username chosen at registration. Unique, publicly visible display name.

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Instrument identifier

columns.name: FirstTradeDate
columns.comment: Earliest trade-related timestamp across silver positions and bronze history

columns.name: update_date
columns.comment: Row last modified time (insert or merge update)

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date key in YYYYMMDD format. DELETE/INSERT partition key. Direct from `Function_Trading_Volume_PositionLevel.DateID` (open or close date). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Trading_Volumes_And_Amounts)

columns.name: final_status_current
columns.comment: Human-readable label for the EV match status, with values None, PartiallyVerified, Verified, NotVerified, associated with customer ID and timestamp.

columns.name: final_status_current_set_ts
columns.comment: Timestamp when the current state version became active, associated with customer ID.

columns.name: final_status_first_verified_ts
columns.comment: Timestamp when the EV match status was first Verified, associated with human-readable label and customer ID.

columns.name: final_status_last_verified_ts
columns.comment: Timestamp when the EV match status was last Verified, associated with human-readable label and customer ID.

columns.name: final_status_last_not_verified_ts
columns.comment: Timestamp when the EV match status was last NotVerified, associated with human-readable label and customer ID.

columns.name: final_status_last_partially_verified_ts
columns.comment: Timestamp when the EV match status was last PartiallyVerified, associated with human-readable label and customer ID.

columns.name: vendor_events_first_attempt_ts
columns.comment: The timestamp of the first verification transaction occurrence.

columns.name: vendor_events_last_attempt_ts
columns.comment: The timestamp of the last verification transaction occurrence.

columns.name: vendor_events_providers_with_any_evidence_count
columns.comment: The count of providers with any evidence, based on the status label and provider display name.

columns.name: vendor_events_latest_provider
columns.comment: The provider display name used in admin tools and verification logs for the latest verification transaction.

columns.name: vendor_events_latest_provider_status
columns.comment: The status label used in compliance dashboards and user management tools for the latest verification transaction.

columns.name: vendor_events_latest_attempt_ts
columns.comment: The timestamp of the latest verification transaction occurrence for a customer.

columns.name: vendor_events_two_sources_event_count
columns.comment: The count of verification transactions with a status label indicating two sources.

columns.name: vendor_events_one_source_event_count
columns.comment: The count of verification transactions with a status label indicating one source.

columns.name: vendor_events_first_two_sources_ts
columns.comment: The timestamp of the first verification transaction occurrence when the status label is associated with two sources.

columns.name: vendor_events_first_one_source_ts
columns.comment: The timestamp of the first verification transaction occurrence when the status label is associated with one source.

columns.name: model_computed_status_from_vendor_events
columns.comment: Derives a status from vendor events based on the Name (status label) from the bronze_userapidb_dictionary_evstatus table.

columns.name: model_evidence_success_ts
columns.comment: Records the timestamp of success in evidence verification, using the Name (provider display name) from the bronze_userapidb_dictionary_evprovider table and the RealCID.

columns.name: model_evidence_last_failure_ts
columns.comment: Records the timestamp of the last failure in evidence verification, using the TransactionDate from the bronze_userapidb_ev_customerresult table.

columns.name: model_time_first_attempt_to_success_sec
columns.comment: Calculates the time in seconds from the first attempt to success in verification, using the Name (provider display name) and RealCID.

columns.name: model_time_first_attempt_to_last_failure_sec
columns.comment: Calculates the time in seconds from the first attempt to the last failure in verification, using the TransactionDate and RealCID.

columns.name: explainability_bucket
columns.comment: Provider display name used in admin tools and verification logs, related to customer ID and status label.

columns.name: provider_datazoo_latest_status
columns.comment: Retrieves the latest status from the Datazoo provider based on the Name (provider display name) and RealCID.

columns.name: provider_datazoo2_latest_status
columns.comment: Retrieves the latest status from the Datazoo2 provider based on the Name (provider display name) and RealCID.

columns.name: VerificationLevelID
columns.comment: KYC verification level. FK to Dictionary.VerificationLevel. Values: 0=unverified (34.2%), 1=partial (12.4%), 2=intermediate (6.2%), 3=fully verified (47.1%). Default=0. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: verification_level_at_first_ev_attempt
columns.comment: The KYC verification level (0 = unverified/basic, higher values = more documented) at the time of the first verification transaction, based on the local server timestamp when the customer state version became active.

columns.name: verification_level_at_last_ev_attempt
columns.comment: The KYC verification level (0 = unverified/basic, higher values = more documented) at the time of the last verification transaction, based on the local server timestamp when the customer state version became active.

columns.name: verification_level_at_final_status_set
columns.comment: The KYC verification level associated with a customer’s ID when their final status was set, based on the customer’s ID and the timestamp when this state version became active.

columns.name: vl3_first_ts
columns.comment: Timestamp when the customer first reached a KYC verification level of 3.

columns.name: mins_first_ev_to_vl3
columns.comment: Calculates the time in minutes from a customer’s first verification event to reaching verification level 3 (VL3), using their TransactionDate, VerificationLevelID, and ValidFrom timestamp.

columns.name: mins_final_status_to_vl3
columns.comment: Calculates the time in minutes from a customer’s final status to reaching verification level 3 (VL3), using their RealCID, ValidFrom timestamp, and VerificationLevelID.

columns.name: vl3_before_first_ev_flag
columns.comment: Indicates if the customer had a KYC verification level of 3 before their first verification attempt.

columns.name: final_verified_but_no_vl3_flag
columns.comment: Indicates whether a customer is fully verified but has not reached verification level 3 (VL3), based on their RealCID and verification status.

columns.name: vl3_but_final_not_verified_flag
columns.comment: Indicates if the customer had a KYC verification level of 3 at some point, but their final status is not verified.

objects.name: vw_bronze_failed_public_api_operations_with_errors
objects.view_definition:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    *,
    -- Extract core error message
    COALESCE(
      get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.errors'),
      get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.errorMessage'),
      get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.Exception.Message'),
      get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.Message'),
      eventData_responseContent
    ) AS _extracted_error,
    -- Extract error code if available
    COALESCE(
      get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.errorCode'),
      get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.Exception.Reason')
    ) AS _error_code,
    -- Extract title field (for RFC-style errors)
    get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.title') AS _error_title
  FROM main.de_output.bronze_event_hub_public_api_operations_evh_bkp_failedpublicapioperation
  
)
SELECT 
  * EXCEPT(_extracted_error, _error_code, _error_title),

  -- api_endpoint: base API path with dynamic IDs removed
  regexp_replace(
    regexp_replace(
      regexp_replace(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(eventData_externalPath,
            '/[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}', ''),
          '/[0-9a-f]{10,}', ''),
        '/\\d+', ''),
      '/sim_[0-9]+', ''),
    '/(FAKE-ORDER-ID|healthcheck-trade-id)', ''
  ) AS api_endpoint,

  -- error_field: categorized error type
  CASE
    WHEN _error_code IS NOT NULL THEN _error_code
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '^\\{"[A-Za-z_.]+":\\[' 
      THEN regexp_extract(_extracted_error, '^\\{"([A-Za-z_.]+)"', 1)
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '^\\{"":\\[' 
      THEN 'DeserializationError'
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '-- [A-Za-z]+:' 
      THEN regexp_extract(_extracted_error, '-- ([A-Za-z]+):', 1)
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '-- :' 
      THEN 'ReferenceIDDuplicate'
    WHEN _error_title IS NOT NULL THEN _error_title
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE 'IsAuthenticationSucceeded' 
      THEN 'AuthenticationFailure'
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '^[a-z]' 
      THEN regexp_extract(_extracted_error, '^([a-z ]+)', 1)
    ELSE 'Unmapped'
  END AS error_field,

  -- error_message: normalized human-readable error description
  CASE
    WHEN _error_code IS NOT NULL THEN
      COALESCE(
        get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.errorMessage'),
        get_json_object(eventData_responseContent, '$.Exception.Message')
      )
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '^\\{"[A-Za-z_.]+":\\[' 
      THEN regexp_replace(
        regexp_extract(_extracted_error, '\\["([^"]+)"', 1),
        '[0-9a-f]{10,}|\\d+', '<N>'
      )
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '^\\{"":\\[' 
      THEN regexp_replace(
        regexp_extract(_extracted_error, '\\["([^"]+)"', 1),
        '[0-9a-f]{10,}|\\d+', '<N>'
      )
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '-- [A-Za-z]+:' 
      THEN regexp_replace(
        regexp_extract(_extracted_error, '-- [A-Za-z]+: (.+?)(?:\\.|Severity)', 1),
        '[0-9a-f]{10,}|\\d+', '<N>'
      )
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE '-- :' 
      THEN regexp_replace(
        regexp_extract(_extracted_error, '-- : (.+?)(?:Severity)', 1),
        '[0-9a-f\\-]{10,}|\\d+', '<N>'
      )
    WHEN _error_title IS NOT NULL THEN _error_title
    WHEN _extracted_error RLIKE 'IsAuthenticationSucceeded' 
      THEN 'Authentication failed - internal server error'
    ELSE SUBSTR(regexp_replace(_extracted_error, '[0-9a-f]{10,}|\\d+', '<N>'), 1, 150)
  END AS error_message

FROM base

objects.name: vw_bronze_public_api_operations
objects.view_definition:
with base as (
SELECT distinct * EXCEPT(EventPayload, eventData,eventMetadata,eventData_query)
FROM main.de_output.vw_bronze_failed_public_api_operations_with_errors

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  distinct * EXCEPT (EventPayload, eventData,eventMetadata,eventData_query),
  -- api_endpoint: same logic as the failed view
  regexp_replace(
    regexp_replace(
      regexp_replace(
        regexp_replace(
          regexp_replace(eventData_externalPath,
            '/[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}', ''),
          '/[0-9a-f]{10,}', ''),
        '/\\d+', ''),
      '/sim_[0-9]+', ''),
    '/(FAKE-ORDER-ID|healthcheck-trade-id)', ''
  ) AS api_endpoint,
  NULL AS error_field,
  NULL AS error_message
FROM main.de_output.bronze_event_hub_public_api_operations_evh_bkp_successfulpublicapioperation
)
select  * 
,   CASE WHEN eventData_externalPath LIKE '%demo%' THEN 'demo' ELSE 'real' END AS is_demo
,   regexp_extract(eventData_externalPath, '/positions/([^/]+)', 1) AS position_id
,   regexp_extract(eventData_externalPath, '(market-open-orders|market-close-orders)', 1) AS trading_action


from base

  Sector_ML_TF_Value,

  BackgroundConsistent_RiskScore,
  BackgroundConsistent_Value,
  TransactionSuspicious_RiskScore,
  TransactionSuspicious_Value,
  IdentityEvidence_RiskScore,
  IdentityEvidence_Value,
  AvoidBusinessRelations_RiskScore,
  AvoidBusinessRelations_Value,
  OwnershipTransparent_RiskScore,
  OwnershipTransparent_Value,
  AssetHoldingVehicle_RiskScore,
  AssetHoldingVehicle_Value,
  TransactionsUnusual_RiskScore,
  TransactionsUnusual_Value,
  SecrecyUnreasonable_RiskScore,
  SecrecyUnreasonable_Value,
  NFTF_RiskScore,
  NFTF_Value,
  IdentityDoubts_RiskScore,
  IdentityDoubts_Value,
  ExpectedProductsUsed_RiskScore,
  ExpectedProductsUsed_Value,
  NonProfitOrgAbused_RiskScore,
  NonProfitOrgAbused_Value,
  CooperativeClient_RiskScore,
  CooperativeClient_Value,
  IdentityAnonymous_RiskScore,
  IdentityAnonymous_Value,
  TransactionComplexity_RiskScore,
  TransactionComplexity_Value,
  PaymentsThirdParty_RiskScore,
  PaymentsThirdParty_Value,
  Finalscore_RiskScore,
  Finalscore_Value,
  RiskScore_Explanation,
  RiskScoreName,
  SourceDate,
  IsLastUpdate
FROM main.de_output.de_output_risk_classification_history
where IsLastUpdate=1

UNION ALL

-- Fallback: users in risk_classification but missing from risk_classification_history
SELECT
  r.Update_Datetime AS BeginTime,
  TIMESTAMP '2099-01-01' AS EndTime,
  r.GCID,
  r.CID,
  r.RegulationID,
  r.Regulation,
  r.CountryofResidence_Onboarding_RiskScore,
  r.CountryofResidence_Onboarding_Value,
  r.CountryofResidence_Existingclients_RiskScore,
  r.CountryofResidence_Existingclients_Value,
  r.Ageofcustomer_RiskScore,
  r.Ageofcustomer_Value,
  r.AgeAlert_RiskScore,
  r.AgeAlert_Value,
  r.ScreeningStatus_RiskScore,
  r.ScreeningStatus_Value,
  r.MainSourceofIncome_RiskScore,
  r.MainSourceofIncome_Value,
  r.Occupation_RiskScore,
  r.Occupation_Value,
  r.SpecialScore_RiskScore,
  r.SpecialScore_Value,
  r.AnnualIncome_RiskScore,
  r.AnnualIncome_Value,
  r.TotalCashAndLiquidAssets_RiskScore,
  r.TotalCashAndLiquidAssets_Value,
  r.MoneyplanToinvest_RiskScore,
  r.MoneyplanToinvest_Value,
  r.HighRisk_RiskScore,
  r.HighRisk_Value,
  r.SectorMLTF_RiskScore,
  r.SectorMLTF_Value,
  r.NetDeposit_RiskScore,
  r.NetDeposit_Value,
  r.FTD_RiskScore,
  r.FTD_Value,
  r.ScoreExpectedOriginFunds_RiskScore,
  r.ScoreExpectedOriginFunds_Value,
  r.ScoreExpectedDestinationPayments_RiskScore,
  r.ScoreExpectedDestinationPayments_Value,
  r.SectorHighRisk_RiskScore,
  r.SectorHighRisk_Value,
  r.Sector_ML_TF_RiskScore,
  r.Sector_ML_TF_Value,
  r.SectorHighCash_RiskScore,
  r.SectorHighCash_Value,
  r.EstablishmentApproved_RiskScore,
  r.EstablishmentApproved_Value,
  r.HighPublicProfile_RiskScore,
  r.HighPublicProfile_Value,
  r.DisclosureSubjected_RiskScore,
  r.DisclosureSubjected_Value,
  r.RegionSupervised_RiskScore,
  r.RegionSupervised_Value,
  r.JurisdictionNonCorrupt_RiskScore,
  r.JurisdictionNonCorrupt_Value,
  r.AML_CFT_Failure_RiskScore,
  r.AML_CFT_Failure_Value,
  r.BackgroundConsistent_RiskScore,
  r.BackgroundConsistent_Value,
  r.TransactionSuspicious_RiskScore,
  r.TransactionSuspicious_Value,
  r.IdentityEvidence_RiskScore,
  r.IdentityEvidence_Value,
  r.AvoidBusinessRelations_RiskScore,
  r.AvoidBusinessRelations_Value,
  r.OwnershipTransparent_RiskScore,
  r.OwnershipTransparent_Value,
  r.AssetHoldingVehicle_RiskScore,
  r.AssetHoldingVehicle_Value,
  r.TransactionsUnusual_RiskScore,
  r.TransactionsUnusual_Value,
  r.SecrecyUnreasonable_RiskScore,
  r.SecrecyUnreasonable_Value,
  r.NFTF_RiskScore,
  r.NFTF_Value,
  r.IdentityDoubts_RiskScore,
  r.IdentityDoubts_Value,
  r.ExpectedProductsUsed_RiskScore,
  r.ExpectedProductsUsed_Value,
  r.NonProfitOrgAbused_RiskScore,
  r.NonProfitOrgAbused_Value,
  r.CooperativeClient_RiskScore,
  r.CooperativeClient_Value,
  r.IdentityAnonymous_RiskScore,
  r.IdentityAnonymous_Value,
  r.TransactionComplexity_RiskScore,
  r.TransactionComplexity_Value,
  r.PaymentsThirdParty_RiskScore,
  r.PaymentsThirdParty_Value,
  r.Finalscore_RiskScore,
  r.Finalscore_Value,
  r.RiskScore_Explanation,
  r.RiskScoreName,
  NULL AS SourceDate,
  1 AS IsLastUpdate
FROM main.de_output.de_output_risk_classification r
LEFT JOIN main.de_output.de_output_risk_classification_history h
  ON r.CID = h.CID
WHERE h.CID IS NULL

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID — cross-regulation unique identifier for a customer across all eToro entities.

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.

columns.name: RegulationID
columns.comment: Regulatory entity identifier (1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 3=ASIC, etc.). FK to Dim_Regulation.

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Regulatory entity/jurisdiction (e.g., CySEC, FCA, ASIC, SEC). Determines which eToro legal entity the customer belongs to.

columns.name: RiskScoreName
columns.comment: Risk classification label for this regulation+score combination (e.g., "Low", "Medium", "High"). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Dictionary.RiskClassificationRegulation)
